TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay ťęėťÄüťźĶŤ∑Į sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , atu sakamu sa sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , saapuyu' hank u ngangansa talakaway a dadan nu silamalay , kikakaan ku dadan nu silamalay sidubaay kuyniyan . , micidekay a utubay a kadideng atu sapatucek a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung . . u kamu isaw u duba' anu putungay nu mikikaka tut ulua kikakaan , , Satalakawat a nikaduba' sa 200 a ku-li . . u sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u mapulungay a sapakatineng , , pasu dadan nu silamalay, u dingki nu calacay, satalakaway a tipid, u sapatelay, u tipid malaliyun sa . . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay haw mutudu' tu kakawsan nu muculilay a dadan nu silamalay saculu' a dadan , nika u imi nida sa u sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay pasu matucekay a dadan atu caculilan nu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay si-tung , kyu u mahiniay u ce-hu- a tipd u imi nida malecad tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay . . u kitakit sayaway misanga tu mahiniay a misiwbayay tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung naw dipun ya sin-kan-sin , namakau 1964 a mihcaan malungatu muculu' tu tademaw .Ťá™1964ŚĻīŤĶ∑ÁáüťĀč. ayda u kitakit idaway ku sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a kanatal a kitidaan atu pasu Cung-ku-ta-lu, Siyang-kang, Taywan, Amilika, dipun, han-ku, ing-ku, huwa-ku, te-ku, pili-se, lusen-paw, he-lan, zuy-tin, zuwiy-se, pu-lan, tan-may, nu-wiy, hun-lan- aw-ti-li, e-lu-se, yi-ta-li, si-la, mu-luw-ke, si-pan-ya, pu-taw-ya, sa-u-ti-a-la-pu, tu-el-ci,u-ce-piy-ke, atu in-tu-ni-si-ya . tini i kitakit satabakiay a talakaway a dadan nu silamalay tini i Cung-ku-ta-lu , u dadan nida makaala tu sepat a emang kung-li , kyu kitakit satalakaway a dadan nu silamalay u tanayu' nida sa san-bun-nu-tusa . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalayťęėťÄüťźĶŤ∑Į baluhay a sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay kapah ku duba' nida katukuh 250 kung-li makaala cacay a tatukiyan . macakat musumad tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , mihang tu hatidaay anikaduba makaala tu 200 a kuli tu cacay a tatukian . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , duma angangan sa sidubaay a dadan nu kisiya , saapuyu' han kungangan sa talakaway a dadan nu silamalay , kilalamkaman ku pu-tungay a silamalay siduba mangaleb ku duba' , u misitekeday a utubay han idaw ku tungus nida a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung . U kamu tu duba' sa nu pu-tungay a mikikaka tu tuluay , satalakaway a nipaculil sa makaala tu 200 kung-li nu pabawan aca yu . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u mapulungay a nidateng , pasu dadan nu kisiya, sapadingki, sakalamkam nu duba' sapatelay u tipid makakutay yadah ku kawaw . . u talakaway a dadan nu silamalay mutudu' tu muculuay nu kakawsan a sapaculil a si-tung , , nika anu saahebalen ku imi sa sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay nicukaymas tu nipatucek a dadan sa atu sapikuwan sa talakaw siduba sa . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalayťęėťÄüťźĶŤ∑Į baluhay a sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay kapah ku duba' nida katukuh 250 kung-li makaala cacay a tatukiyan . macakat musumad tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , mihang tu hatidaay anikaduba makaala tu 200 a kuli tu cacay a tatukian . . u cayay kalecad nipaimi sa ŚźĄŚúčŚģöÁĺ© u Dipun ; malakitakid nu sayaway misanga tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a kanatal , , u Dipun nayi 1970 a mihcaan mihapiyu " kanatal nuheni baluhay a sin-kan-sin a dadan nu silamalay a hulic" paticek nu kanatal a hulic sin-kan-sin a dadan nu silamalay a pacakat tu hulic sa , , pasayni i sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u imi nida sa , anu cacay aca ku dadan nu silamalay u tatelungan tu , , u tipid satalakaway nikaduba sa makaala tu 200 kung-li tu may cacay a tatukian atu malakuwit , kyu pangangan han tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay . . Amilika :u pulung nu Amilika mikuwanay tu silamalay pasayni "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay" a nu siyhu a paimi sa u talakaway a sapiculu' u sidubaay 200 kung-li tu cacay a tatukian ku duba a dadan nu silamalay sa . Pakayni nu sayku a nipiadih sa "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay" i amilika wiyni sa u sapi culu' u duba' nida sa talakaw tu 200 kung-li tu paycacay a tatukian sapiedap tu mikacaway . Cung-ku- ta-lu: cung-ku a kanatal nu ticu-dubu pasayni i sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u tucek paimi sa u baluhay nipatideng malingatu paculil 250 a kung-li tu maycacay a tatukiyan "pasu niliwan" atu tipid atu tipid a kaput , sayaway a malingatu paculil u duba' nida sa caykaw 200 kung-li hatu basu nu widaan a dadan nu silamalay . /ŚįŹśôāÁöĄŚģĘťĀčŚįąÁ∑öťźĶŤ∑Į. mahini i 2014 a mihcaan cung-ku kanatal a ti-cu-du-bu mipi-cun a mihapiyu tu sapikacaw tu silamalay a sapatucek "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay ni pi si-ki sapikuwan" "TB 10621-2014" "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay ni pi si-ki sapikuwan" taneng pakayni nu baluhay a nipi si-ki tu duba' makaala tu 250~350 a kung-li tu maycacay a tatukiyan , nika i cung-ku nu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a calaycay a sapidateng sa , , Nu siy-hu pakaynin nu kanatal a imi nu talakaway a silamalay nipatucekan caay kaw macacecelay u talakaway a silamalay a piyaw-cun , , kyu anumisiki tu duba' makaala tu 200km/h nu pabawan a dadan nu silamalay sa kapah pakaynien nu tatengaay a sakayduhan amuhamin amikiyaku , 200km/h , mapuling pacumud i sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay nu calacay wiynian sa taayaw henay a milubang .
S.PHON: sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj **** sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , atu sakamu sa sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , saapuju Ē~ ° ńßank u ŇčaŇčansa tar~…ĺakawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , kikakaan ku dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sidubaaj kujnijan . , mi ¶id…ôkaj a utubaj a kadid…ôŇč atu sapatu ¶…ôk a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a si-tuŇč . . u kamu isaw u duba Ē~ ° anu putuŇčaj nu mikikaka tut ur~…ĺua kikakaan , , satar~…ĺakawat a nikaduba Ē~ ° sa *** a ku-r~…ĺi . . u sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj u mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a sapakatin…ôŇč , , pasu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, u diŇčki nu ¶ar~…ĺa ¶aj, satar~…ĺakawaj a tipid, u sapat…ôr~…ĺaj, u tipid mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun sa . . sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ńßaw mutudu Ē~ ° tu kakawsan nu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sa ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a dadan , nika u imi nida sa u sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj pasu matu ¶…ôkaj a dadan atu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj si-tuŇč , kju u mańßiniaj u ¶…ô-ńßu- a tipd u imi nida mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj . . u kitakit sajawaj misaŇča tu mańßiniaj a misiwbajaj tu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a si-tuŇč naw dipun ja sin-kan-sin , namakau **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺuŇčatu mu ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw .*********. ajda u kitakit idawaj ku sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ a kitidaan atu pasu ¶uŇč-ku-ta-r~…ĺu, sijaŇč-kaŇč, tajwan, amir~…ĺika, dipun, ńßan-ku, iŇč-ku, ńßuwa-ku, t…ô-ku, pir~…ĺi-s…ô, r~…ĺus…ôn-paw, ńß…ô-r~…ĺan, zuj-tin, zuwij-s…ô, pu-r~…ĺan, tan-maj, nu-wij, ńßun-r~…ĺan- aw-ti-r~…ĺi, …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô, ji-ta-r~…ĺi, si-r~…ĺa, mu-r~…ĺuw-k…ô, si-pan-ja, pu-taw-ja, sa-u-ti-a-r~…ĺa-pu, tu-…ôr~…ĺ- ¶i,u- ¶…ô-pij-k…ô, atu in-tu-ni-si-ja . tini i kitakit satabakiaj a tar~…ĺakawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tini i ¶uŇč-ku-ta-r~…ĺu , u dadan nida makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a …ômaŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi , kju kitakit satar~…ĺakawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj u tanaju Ē~ ° nida sa san-bun-nu-tusa . sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj**** bar~…ĺuńßaj a sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj kapańß ku duba Ē~ ° nida katukuńß *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi makaar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a tatukijan . ma ¶akat musumad tu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , mińßaŇč tu ńßatidaaj anikaduba makaar~…ĺa tu *** a kur~…ĺi tu ¶a ¶aj a tatukian . sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , duma aŇčaŇčan sa sidubaaj a dadan nu kisija , saapuju Ē~ ° ńßan kuŇčaŇčan sa tar~…ĺakawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , kir~…ĺar~…ĺamkaman ku pu-tuŇčaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj siduba maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku duba Ē~ ° , u misit…ôk…ôdaj a utubaj ńßan idaw ku tuŇčus nida a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a si-tuŇč . u kamu tu duba Ē~ ° sa nu pu-tuŇčaj a mikikaka tu tur~…ĺuaj , satar~…ĺakawaj a nipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sa makaar~…ĺa tu *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi nu pabawan a ¶a ju . sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj u mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a nidat…ôŇč , pasu dadan nu kisija, sapadiŇčki, sakar~…ĺamkam nu duba Ē~ ° sapat…ôr~…ĺaj u tipid makakutaj jadańß ku kawaw . . u tar~…ĺakawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj mutudu Ē~ ° tu mu ¶ur~…ĺuaj nu kakawsan a sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a si-tuŇč , , nika anu saańß…ôbar~…ĺ…ôn ku imi sa sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ni ¶ukajmas tu nipatu ¶…ôk a dadan sa atu sapikuwan sa tar~…ĺakaw siduba sa . sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj**** bar~…ĺuńßaj a sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj kapańß ku duba Ē~ ° nida katukuńß *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi makaar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a tatukijan . ma ¶akat musumad tu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , mińßaŇč tu ńßatidaaj anikaduba makaar~…ĺa tu *** a kur~…ĺi tu ¶a ¶aj a tatukian . . u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nipaimi sa **** u dipun ; mar~…ĺakitakid nu sajawaj misaŇča tu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ , , u dipun naji **** a mińß ¶aan mińßapiju " kanatar~…ĺ nuńß…ôni bar~…ĺuńßaj a sin-kan-sin a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶" pati ¶…ôk nu kanatar~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sin-kan-sin a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a pa ¶akat tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sa , , pasajni i sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj u imi nida sa , anu ¶a ¶aj a ¶a ku dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan tu , , u tipid satar~…ĺakawaj nikaduba sa makaar~…ĺa tu *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu maj ¶a ¶aj a tatukian atu mar~…ĺakuwit , kju paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj . . amir~…ĺika :u pur~…ĺuŇč nu amir~…ĺika mikuwanaj tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj pasajni "sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj" a nu sijńßu a paimi sa u tar~…ĺakawaj a sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° u sidubaaj *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu ¶a ¶aj a tatukian ku duba a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sa . pakajni nu sajku a nipiadińß sa "sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj" i amir~…ĺika wijni sa u sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° u duba Ē~ ° nida sa tar~…ĺakaw tu *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu paj ¶a ¶aj a tatukian sapi…ôdap tu mika ¶awaj . ¶uŇč-ku- ta-r~…ĺu: ¶uŇč-ku a kanatar~…ĺ nu ti ¶u-dubu pasajni i sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj u tu ¶…ôk paimi sa u bar~…ĺuńßaj nipatid…ôŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ *** a kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu maj ¶a ¶aj a tatukijan "pasu nir~…ĺiwan" atu tipid atu tipid a kaput , sajawaj a mar~…ĺiŇčatu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ u duba Ē~ ° nida sa ¶ajkaw *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi ńßatu basu nu widaan a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj . /*********. mańßini i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶uŇč-ku kanatar~…ĺ a ti- ¶u-du-bu mipi- ¶un a mińßapiju tu sapika ¶aw tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a sapatu ¶…ôk "sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ni pi si-ki sapikuwan" "tb *****-****" "sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ni pi si-ki sapikuwan" tan…ôŇč pakajni nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nipi si-ki tu duba Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu ***~*** a kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu maj ¶a ¶aj a tatukijan , nika i ¶uŇč-ku nu sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a ¶ar~…ĺaj ¶aj a sapidat…ôŇč sa , , nu sij-ńßu pakajnin nu kanatar~…ĺ a imi nu tar~…ĺakawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nipatu ¶…ôkan ¶aaj kaw ma ¶a ¶…ô ¶…ôr~…ĺaj u tar~…ĺakawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a pijaw- ¶un , , kju anumisiki tu duba Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu ***km/ńß nu pabawan a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sa kapańß pakajni…ôn nu tat…ôŇčaaj a sakajduńßan amuńßamin amikijaku , ***km/ńß , mapur~…ĺiŇč pa ¶umud i sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu ¶ar~…ĺa ¶aj wijnian sa taajaw ńß…ônaj a mir~…ĺubaŇč .
S.FORM: sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay ťęėťÄüťźĶŤ∑Į sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , atu sakamu sa sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , saapuyu' hank u ngangansa talakaway a dadan nu silamalay , kikakaan ku dadan nu silamalay sidubaay kuyniyan . , micidekay a utubay a kadideng atu sapatucek a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung . . u kamu isaw u duba' anu putungay nu mikikaka tut ulua kikakaan , , Satalakawat a nikaduba' sa 200 a ku-li . . u sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u mapulungay a sapakatineng , , pasu dadan nu silamalay, u dingki nu calacay, satalakaway a tipid, u sapatelay, u tipid malaliyun sa . . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay haw mutudu' tu kakawsan nu muculilay a dadan nu silamalay saculu' a dadan , nika u imi nida sa u sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay pasu matucekay a dadan atu caculilan nu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay si-tung , kyu u mahiniay u ce-hu- a tipd u imi nida malecad tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay . . u kitakit sayaway misanga tu mahiniay a misiwbayay tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung naw dipun ya sin-kan-sin , namakau 1964 a mihcaan malungatu muculu' tu tademaw .Ťá™1964ŚĻīŤĶ∑ÁáüťĀč. ayda u kitakit idaway ku sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a kanatal a kitidaan atu pasu Cung-ku-ta-lu, Siyang-kang, Taywan, Amilika, dipun, han-ku, ing-ku, huwa-ku, te-ku, pili-se, lusen-paw, he-lan, zuy-tin, zuwiy-se, pu-lan, tan-may, nu-wiy, hun-lan- aw-ti-li, e-lu-se, yi-ta-li, si-la, mu-luw-ke, si-pan-ya, pu-taw-ya, sa-u-ti-a-la-pu, tu-el-ci,u-ce-piy-ke, atu in-tu-ni-si-ya . tini i kitakit satabakiay a talakaway a dadan nu silamalay tini i Cung-ku-ta-lu , u dadan nida makaala tu sepat a emang kung-li , kyu kitakit satalakaway a dadan nu silamalay u tanayu' nida sa san-bun-nu-tusa . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalayťęėťÄüťźĶŤ∑Į baluhay a sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay kapah ku duba' nida katukuh 250 kung-li makaala cacay a tatukiyan . macakat musumad tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , mihang tu hatidaay anikaduba makaala tu 200 a kuli tu cacay a tatukian . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , duma angangan sa sidubaay a dadan nu kisiya , saapuyu' han kungangan sa talakaway a dadan nu silamalay , kilalamkaman ku pu-tungay a silamalay siduba mangaleb ku duba' , u misitekeday a utubay han idaw ku tungus nida a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung . U kamu tu duba' sa nu pu-tungay a mikikaka tu tuluay , satalakaway a nipaculil sa makaala tu 200 kung-li nu pabawan aca yu . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u mapulungay a nidateng , pasu dadan nu kisiya, sapadingki, sakalamkam nu duba' sapatelay u tipid makakutay yadah ku kawaw . . u talakaway a dadan nu silamalay mutudu' tu muculuay nu kakawsan a sapaculil a si-tung , , nika anu saahebalen ku imi sa sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay nicukaymas tu nipatucek a dadan sa atu sapikuwan sa talakaw siduba sa . sidubaay a dadan nu silamalayťęėťÄüťźĶŤ∑Į baluhay a sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay kapah ku duba' nida katukuh 250 kung-li makaala cacay a tatukiyan . macakat musumad tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay , mihang tu hatidaay anikaduba makaala tu 200 a kuli tu cacay a tatukian . . u cayay kalecad nipaimi sa ŚźĄŚúčŚģöÁĺ© u Dipun ; malakitakid nu sayaway misanga tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a kanatal , , u Dipun nayi 1970 a mihcaan mihapiyu " kanatal nuheni baluhay a sin-kan-sin a dadan nu silamalay a hulic" paticek nu kanatal a hulic sin-kan-sin a dadan nu silamalay a pacakat tu hulic sa , , pasayni i sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u imi nida sa , anu cacay aca ku dadan nu silamalay u tatelungan tu , , u tipid satalakaway nikaduba sa makaala tu 200 kung-li tu may cacay a tatukian atu malakuwit , kyu pangangan han tu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay . . Amilika :u pulung nu Amilika mikuwanay tu silamalay pasayni "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay" a nu siyhu a paimi sa u talakaway a sapiculu' u sidubaay 200 kung-li tu cacay a tatukian ku duba a dadan nu silamalay sa . Pakayni nu sayku a nipiadih sa "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay" i amilika wiyni sa u sapi culu' u duba' nida sa talakaw tu 200 kung-li tu paycacay a tatukian sapiedap tu mikacaway . Cung-ku- ta-lu: cung-ku a kanatal nu ticu-dubu pasayni i sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay u tucek paimi sa u baluhay nipatideng malingatu paculil 250 a kung-li tu maycacay a tatukiyan "pasu niliwan" atu tipid atu tipid a kaput , sayaway a malingatu paculil u duba' nida sa caykaw 200 kung-li hatu basu nu widaan a dadan nu silamalay . /ŚįŹśôāÁöĄŚģĘťĀčŚįąÁ∑öťźĶŤ∑Į. mahini i 2014 a mihcaan cung-ku kanatal a ti-cu-du-bu mipi-cun a mihapiyu tu sapikacaw tu silamalay a sapatucek "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay ni pi si-ki sapikuwan" "TB 10621-2014" "sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay ni pi si-ki sapikuwan" taneng pakayni nu baluhay a nipi si-ki tu duba' makaala tu 250~350 a kung-li tu maycacay a tatukiyan , nika i cung-ku nu sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay a calaycay a sapidateng sa , , Nu siy-hu pakaynin nu kanatal a imi nu talakaway a silamalay nipatucekan caay kaw macacecelay u talakaway a silamalay a piyaw-cun , , kyu anumisiki tu duba' makaala tu 200km/h nu pabawan a dadan nu silamalay sa kapah pakaynien nu tatengaay a sakayduhan amuhamin amikiyaku , 200km/h , mapuling pacumud i sidubaay a dadan nu silamalay nu calacay wiynian sa taayaw henay a milubang .
S.PHON: sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj **** sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , atu sakamu sa sidubaaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , saapuju Ē~ ° ńßank u ŇčaŇčansa tar~…ĺakawaj a dadan nu
